text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is more something for the questions@freebsd.org mailinglist, please 
poke around there. It could be that you are the only one havin these 
"problems" and in case you are not, we need to have some kind of 
datapoint and "me too" messages before we can actually investigate this. 
Thanks for trying to make FreeBSD better!
